content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty down 0.60% with IT getting crushed (-4.65%) on HCLTECH miss, but broad market showing rotation into PSU Banks, Power, Capital Goods, and FMCG on strong earnings. VIX at 18 (+3%) signals elevated uncertainty. Mixed tape — selective long-side setups in earnings winners are viable, but position sizing should stay disciplined.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24350,
      "nifty_resistance": 24550
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 77.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if target not hit in 10 trading days or if price closes below 77 (prior consolidation support)",
      "reasoning": "Q4 blockbuster (+35% PAT, NNPA 0.13%), stock up ~25% in 3 sessions on 2.4x volume breaking to 52-wk high. Thesis intact and strengthening. Setting SL at 77 (below prior day low/consolidation), target 88 (measured move extension). R:R ~1:1.7 from CMP."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 945.00,
      "new_target": 1080.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if target not hit in 10 trading days or on close below 945 (gap-fill support)",
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat (+19% PAT), GNPA below 1%, stock gapped +8.8% on 1.3x volume. Intraday holding Rs 980-990 well — not a blow-off top. SL at 945 protects most of gap, target 1080 into prior resistance zone. R:R ~1:2.4."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.50,
      "new_target": 132.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if target not hit in 15 days or on close below 121.50 (below 20-SMA)",
      "reasoning": "Gold consolidating post-Akshaya Tritiya profit-taking but structural thesis intact (VIX elevated, Middle East risk, Fed easing). Hammer on 04-20 suggests support. SL at 121.50 below 20-SMA, target 132 (prior high extension). Defensive position, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 50,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1415.00,
      "stop_loss": 1370.00,
      "target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if target not hit in 10 days or on close below 1370 (below breakout base)",
      "reasoning": "Stellar Q4 (revenue +22.6%, EBITDA margin 26.3%, PAT +27%) — strongest FMCG print in the quarter. Clean breakout from 1260-1290 consolidation on a risk-off day where FMCG is leading. Defensive quality franchise. Position ~Rs 70.7k (~7% of capital). R:R ~1:1.9. SL below breakout zone."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 70,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1050.00,
      "stop_loss": 1010.00,
      "target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit before Apr 27 board meeting if position is at loss; otherwise hold through results for catalyst. Exit if SL hit."
    ,
      "reasoning": "SFB sector leader today +5.5% against flat Bank Nifty. Strong provisional Q4 (deposits +22.8%, advances +25.1%, NNPA 0.90%). Board meeting Apr 27 is a known catalyst within holding window. Breaking out above 1040 resistance. Position ~Rs 73.5k (~7%). R:R ~1:2."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HCLTECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Brutal Q4 miss, margin -200bps QoQ, CEO flagging weak discretionary spend. IT sector down 4.65%. Catching falling knife — no reversal signal yet. Wait for stabilization."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock +21.5% in 9 sessions, at ATH, shooting star on 04-20. Overbought into Q4 on Apr 29. Risk-reward unfavorable at these levels. Wait for pullback to 195-200 zone."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DEEPAKNTR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+11.7% move but no earnings catalyst yet (Q4 ~May 30), sector headwind from petrochem duty waiver, Q3 revenue growth only 3%. Momentum-only move without fundamentals. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ELECON",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT -96% YoY on impairment, FY26 PAT -18%. Sector momentum carrying stock but fundamentals weak. Prefer ABB for capital goods exposure. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ABB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.48,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Great franchise at ATH but 89x P/E is stretched and already up 8.3% today. Q1 results May 8 is beyond comfort. Wait for pullback to 7200-7300 zone."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.48,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already added NESTLEIND for FMCG exposure. HUL is 1Y laggard with Unilever foods overhang. Results Apr 30 — wait for clarity."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GAIL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "1Y underperformer -17%, pipeline project delays, tariff pressure. Today's bounce is oil-sector beta, not structural. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ZENTEC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.42,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "FY26 revenue expected to contract ~35% (MOFSL Neutral, target 1400 below CMP). Strong orders but valuation demanding. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Solid fundamentals and USFDA audit closure positive, but stock near 52-week high and Q4 results Apr 29 event risk. Watching for entry on pullback to 650-660."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Good sector setup but Q1 PAT -25% recent. Already at 52-wk high, and I'm avoiding power exposure near-term given broad overbought tape. Pass."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 77.00,
      "reasoning": "Locking in gains near entry. Strong Q4 thesis lets me ride trend with SL below 20-SMA and prior consolidation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 945.00,
      "reasoning": "SL tightened to protect most of the gap-up. Room for target to 1080."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.50,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge on VIX elevated tape. SL formalized below 20-SMA."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "GRANULES on pullback to 650-660 is a good Q4-catalyst swing. ABB/ADANIPOWER on pullback to support. HCLTECH for mean-reversion only after 2-3 days of stabilization above 1300.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Portfolio becoming more constructive — upgrading existing positions with formal SLs + adding two high-conviction earnings winners (NESTLEIND, AUBANK). Post-trades deployment ~Rs 371k (~37%), well within 80% limit. Cash buffer 63% maintains flexibility. Sector distribution: PSU Bank, HFC, Gold ETF, FMCG, SFB — diversified, no sector >20%. Avoiding IT/chemicals/power where setups unclear."
}
